**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.
   

  

**Disclaimer**
 We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
Svea Solar is on the verge of transforming how we manage energy with just the click of a button. We're here to help our customers make the most of their energy usage while also balancing the energy grid with smart, innovative solutions. To bring this vision to life, we're expanding our engineering team and are on the lookout for our next Backend Engineer.
   

  

**About The Role & The Team**
 As a Backend Engineer, you'll join our Sunbeam Labs, where we’re creating digital services that range from energy optimization to virtual power plants. You’ll work closely with a talented and energetic team of engineers and domain experts, all focused on building cutting-edge software solutions that make energy optimization a reality for our customers.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll be involved in every stage of the software development lifecycle, from brainstorming ideas to deployment and ongoing maintenance. Since we’re pioneering services that haven’t existed before, there’s plenty of room for discovery and problem-solving! You’ll be working with thousands of connected devices that we control in real-time, based on measurements taken multiple times per second. Your daily challenges might include figuring out how to distribute work among devices, handling AWS datacenter failovers without a hitch, counting milliseconds and megawatts, and even predicting tomorrow’s sunshine.
   

  

 If you love tackling challenges, writing code, and having fun while doing it, this could be the
   

  

 perfect fit for you!
   

  

 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility / hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 Are we a match?
   

  

 At Svea Solar, we’re all about our values, and we want to make sure they resonate with you too. We’re looking for a Backend Engineer who’s not just experienced, but who’s also passionate about end-to-end development. We’re less concerned with how many years you’ve been working and more interested in your skills, mindset, and enthusiasm. You should be comfortable with architecture styles and APIs (like REST or RPC) and have strong communication skills with a proactive attitude.
   

  

**Here’s what we’re looking for:**
* You value team success over personal success.
* Experience as a Backend Developer (preferably with .NET)
* A solid understanding of architecture styles and APIs
* Great communication skills


**Bonus points if you have:**
* Knowledge of cloud technologies (we use AWS)
* Experience in the energy sector
* Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
* Experience with time series databases
* Experience working with physical devices


 We are a hybrid team that meets at our office in Alvik Strand 3 times a week.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, we’d love to meet you! Join us on our mission to revolutionize home energy solutions and create a greener, more sustainable future.
   

  

 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: C++/.NET Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**


We are looking for an experienced C++ / .NET Engineer to join a team working on a large and technically advanced software framework. In this role, you will contribute to both the evolution of the existing platform and the development of new capabilities that support the long-term growth of the product.


This position is well suited for a developer who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, working within a structured and mature codebase, and contributing to architectural discussions while remaining hands-on in development.


You will collaborate closely with other engineers in an agile environment, participating in daily stand-ups, refinements, and ongoing technical discussions.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop and enhance a large-scale software framework built with C++ and .NET technologies.
* Understand and work with framework components, data flows, and system dependencies.
* Maintain and improve the platform through bug fixes, refactoring, and performance optimization.
* Implement new features and enhancements based on stakeholder and product requirements.
* Contribute to continuous improvements that enhance product quality, maintainability, and development efficiency.
* Participate in technical discussions and architectural decision-making.
* Analyze existing implementations and propose improvements or alternative solutions when appropriate.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure reliable and scalable solutions.

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent experience.
* Professional experience developing software using C++ and .NET / C#.
* Experience building libraries, backend services, and APIs.
* Experience working within large and structured codebases.
* Knowledge of Windows desktop GUI development.
* Solid understanding of multithreading and concurrent programming.
* Experience with backend services, machine-to-machine APIs, authentication/authorization, and databases.
* Ability to maintain, understand, and improve legacy systems.
* Familiarity with layered architecture and distributed systems with multiple dependencies.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Sr Frontend Engineer
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Description Summary:**
 As PayPal continues its mission to revolutionize commerce, we are on the lookout for a skilled Senior Frontend Engineer to join one of our teams at the forefront of shaping innovative web experiences and crafting modern user interfaces that positively impact our merchants' lives. If this introduction sparks your interest, keep reading – the best is yet to come!
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities And Preferred Qualifications**
**Meet the Team**
 The
 **POS Web Experience** 
 team owns the back office experience for all in-store merchants. Our goal is to provide valuable insights and full control over the day-to-day operations of the business, ensure an effortless access to sales, accounting and reporting tools spanning across online and in-person purchases.
   

  

 By joining our team, you'll work at the heart of these systems, building scalable services that turn complex financial data into seamless, high-impact user experiences. You’ll closely collaborate with colleagues in our Stockholm office as well as PayPal teams across the globe. Ready to make an impact?
   

  

**Your day-to-day**
 As a Sr Software Engineer focused on Web, you'll design and implement robust frontend solutions while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality web products.
   

  

 Your day-to-day will primarily involve:
   

  

* Designing and developing scalable web applications and user interfaces
* Optimizing web performance, accessibility, and user experience
* Learning from and supporting other engineers
* Collaborating with design teams to implement pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Advanced proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, with deep expertise in ES6+, asynchronous programming, and modern architectural patterns for large-scale frontend systems.
* Extensive hands-on experience with modern frameworks (React, Vue.js, or Angular), designing and evolving scalable, maintainable, and reusable frontend architectures.
* Demonstrated ownership of high-performance web applications, including performance optimization strategies, accessibility (WCAG compliance), and cross-browser resilience at scale.
* Strong technical leadership capabilities, actively driving code quality through reviews, influencing architectural decisions, leading design discussions, and mentoring engineers across levels.
* Expert-level knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, responsive design systems, and modern build tooling (Webpack, Vite, or similar), including optimization and configuration strategies.
* Deep understanding of state management patterns, complex API integrations, frontend observability, and automated testing strategies to ensure long-term reliability and scalability.


**Get bonus points with...**
* Experience with large-scale, high-traffic web applications
* Knowledge of web security best practices and payment processing interfaces
* Contributions to open-source web projects
* Micro-frontends, and modern deployment strategies (CI/CD, containerization)


**We Believe in You**
 Interested? Don’t hesitate to apply or reach out and let's talk — we’d love to get to know you!
   

  

 \_
   

  

 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer benefits to help you thrive in every stage of life. We champion your financial, physical, and mental health by offering valuable benefits and resources to help you care for the whole you.
   

  

 We have great benefits including a flexible work environment, employee shares options, health and life insurance and more. To learn more about our benefits please visit https://www.paypalbenefits.com
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 To learn more about our culture and community visit https://about.pypl.com/who-we-are/default.aspx
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.
   

  

 REQ ID R0135026

title: Lead Software Engineer - Product Engineering
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 As a Lead Software Engineer in Product Engineering, you will be responsible for designing and building high-polish, fail-safe user experiences across our member-facing applications and clinical workflows. This role blends deep system design, product thinking, and AI-native engineering excellence.
   

  

 You will lead by example in an environment where engineers invest in understanding the "why" before deciding the "how," own outcomes end-to-end, and look for the architectural change or automation that makes things 10x better rather than incrementally improved. You will work across Product, Data Science, and Hardware teams in a vertically integrated organisation where your decisions directly influence member trust, clinic reliability, and Neko's ability to scale.
   

  

**What You Will Deliver in the First 6 to 12 Months**
* Become a fully ramped core contributor within your first 3 months, owning meaningful parts of the Member Experience or Medical Excellence product domains.
* Architect and deliver end-to-end features that significantly enhance customer journeys, ensuring experiences are seamless, resilient, and clinically safe. There is nothing too hard to solve for our members.
* Introduce and champion AI-first workflows, using tools such as Claude Code to handle the 80% so your focus stays on the system design and outcomes that truly matter.
* Drive clarity in ambiguous problem spaces. Surface problems early, ask the right questions about context and intent, and provide direct and honest feedback even when there is no perfect answer.
* Lead critical reliability and quality initiatives, ensuring member-facing systems are robust, scalable, and able to support Neko's rapid growth.
* Influence and mentor other engineers, raising the bar for technical excellence, problem-solving depth, and customer centricity.
* Collaborate with cross-functional partners across Product, Data Science, and Hardware to align system design with real-world clinical and operational needs.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Demonstrated experience building and operating large-scale products with real customer usage.
* Proven strength in full-stack engineering with a strong product sense and ownership mindset. You solve the problem regardless of the tool.
* Daily use of AI coding tools, with a deeply curious mindset and the ability to articulate when and how AI accelerates development.
* Evidence of deep problem-solving ability, thinking beyond assigned tasks to deliver impactful, member-first outcomes.
* Experience designing or contributing to complex systems in production environments.
* Ability to work effectively with non-engineering teams and translate technical decisions into business impact.


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Senior Software Engineer – AI Product Experience
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 This team is central to how we deliver AI to our customers. From the infrastructure and RAG pipelines that power intelligence behind the scenes to the conversational UI that brings it to life, this team owns the entire experience. As a senior engineer, your impact will be immediate and highly visible you’ll help define how customers interact with Funnel’s AI capabilities and shape the future of AI-driven marketing insights.
   

  

**About The Engineering Team & Your Role**
 Our engineering teams have deep ownership of their product areas, making daily decisions in close collaboration across teams and with stakeholders. We work in small, iterative cycles- experimenting, learning, and deploying to production multiple times a day. We work closely with AI agents to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning.
   

  

 As a senior engineer on this team, you will drive technical direction across the full AI feature stack: infrastructure, RAG pipelines, Amazon Bedrock integrations, and the web UI that delivers the experience. You’ll play a key role in making architectural decisions, improving systems, and ensuring our AI features are robust, scalable, and intuitive.
   

  

 We primarily use
 **Python and TypeScript, and our entire platform runs in AWS** 
 .
   

  

 At Funnel, engineers own the full lifecycle from architecture and design to implementation, deployment, and monitoring. Senior engineers also mentor others, elevate engineering quality, and help shape product strategy through technical insight.
   

  

**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* Experience building applications with LLMs, including techniques such as RAG, embeddings, vector search, and prompt engineering
* Hands-on experience setting up and maintaining cloud-based AI workloads
* Strong backend engineering skills in TypeScript, Python, or similar languages
* AI mindset: leveraging AI agents to to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning
* Experience designing and operating scalable infrastructure, including APIs, data pipelines, and observability
* Comfortable working with web technologies and building user-facing features (e.g., React, Next.js, or similar frameworks)
* Comfortable working in agile, collaborative teams, partnering closely with fellow engineers and keeping initiatives moving smoothly
* Experience leading or steering projects involving multiple stakeholders
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Build meaningful tech that powers millions of daily jobs for customers around the world.
* Help shape our next-gen platform as we grow and move toward an AI-first future.
* Enjoy real ownership with the freedom to design, build, and ship every day.
* Work with friendly, collaborative teams who care about quality and each other.
* Grow with us in a company that invests in learning, innovation, and people.


**Location & Eligibility**
 At This Time, We Can Only Consider Applicants Who Are Already Based In Stockholm And Meet One Of The Following Criteria
   

  

* Hold Swedish citizenship
* Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently living in Stockholm
* Have a valid Swedish work permit


**Office-first**
 At Funnel, we have an office-first approach, and we work from the office a minimum of four days a week. We have lots of flexibility for when life happens, during the summer, through the holidays. We just like to avoid having standing remote days.
   

  

**About Funnel**
 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.

title: Backendutvecklare .NET/Azure till prisbelönt digitalbyrå
description:
***Att vakna på morgonen med längtan att gå till jobbet!***
 Vi har ett mål att alla som jobbar hos oss ska trivas så mycket att man vaknar med ett leende på måndag morgon. Vi är kanske inte Sveriges bästa bolag inom alla punkter men vi är Sveriges näst bästa bolag enligt Great Place to Work 2020. Vi tror att det beror på vår energi och nyfikenhet, vårt sätt att välkomna olikheter och våra erfarenheter som vi gärna delar med oss av.
   

  

 Rebel and Bird är ett av B3s dotterbolag som tar hand om kunders önskemål och krav och förädlar dessa till flerfaldigt prisbelönta tekniska lösningar. Du blir inte nedbunden i gamla tekniker utan får möjligheten att jobba med det senaste inom backend och utvecklas med oss varje dag. Vårt absolut tydligaste mål med verksamheten är att alla ska ha kul på jobbet. Det låter som en plattityd men det är vårt stora mål. Vi försöker (när så går) att träffas och göra roliga saker utanför arbetstid någon gång i månaden utöver julfest, sommarfest och konferenser.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Du kommer arbeta både i interna och externa åtaganden, dvs i våra egna produktutvecklingsteam där vi tar helhetsgrepp på våra kunders önskemål, från koncept till UX och publicerad webb samt ibland på konsultbasis i våra kunders team. Vi har i dagsläget tre större åtaganden men en hel del mindre inhouse-projekt och externa konsultåtaganden. Här är två större inhouse-åtaganden:
   

  

* Parks and Resorts - Vi utvecklar hela webblösningen inhouse i samarbete med kundens redaktörer och produktägare för samtliga parker. Den tekniska plattformen utvecklas med contentful/gatsby och .NET/Azure. Vi har blivit uppmärksammade nationellt för detta arbete, dels med ett silver i Svenska Designpriset 2019 för Kolmården, en nominering i Svenska Designpriset 2020 för Gröna Lund (prisutdelningen har ännu inte skett så vi vet inte var vi landar) samt Kolmården seger i IDG topp-100 för bästa turismsajt.
* Filmstaden - Har du bokat/köpt biobiljett? Kanske inte på sistone men innan året som gud glömde gjorde du antagligen det har du använt vår lösning. Vi ansvarar för all extern webb samt vissa interna delar. Med denna sajt vann vi IDG topp100 2018 (då SF Bio). Webben utvecklas i en episervermiljö med .NET och Azure.


**Vi tror att du har:**
* Ca 5 års erfarenhet av att arbeta skarpt som utvecklare. Det är viktigt att du arbetat i enterprise-projekt med webb för många slutanvändare.
* .NET och Azure-kompetens


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Kapacitet att ta tead-roll i våra projekt.
* Kompetens inom Episerver och Contentful-erfarenhet, Xamarin
* Erfarenhet som konsult


**Vi erbjuder**
 Vi är en flexibel arbetsplats som kommer erbjuda distansarbete även när pandemin är över. För dem som vill jobba från kontoret på Sveavägen är det bara att komma in och jobba, dem som föredrar distansarbete kommer jobba primärt hemifrån men vara på kontoret 1-2 dagar i veckan i alla fall av primärt sociala skäl. Vi vill inte bara vara en namnlista på Slack. Utöver den naturliga komptensutvecklingen som sker av att arbeta i team med likasinnade erbjuder vi både externa och interna utbildningar. Vi startar exempelvis ett nytt initiativ vi kallar Kompetensnätverk - Från utvecklare till arkitekt, där en av våra lösningsarkitekter guidar dem som vill mot mer kunskap inom arkitektur för att förbereda dig för en roll som lösningsarkitekt om du så önskar.
   

  

 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba på B3 och Rebel and Bird och hur vi arbetar med wellness och våra sociala initiativ här
   

  

 Klicka på ansökan eller tveka inte att kontakta Jocke Ginsburg på telefonnummer: 073-8133010 eller email: jocke@rebelandbird.com

title: Senior Software Engineer - Data Platform Infrastructure
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 Our data platform sits at the heart of everything we do. Every day, it powers over 9 million download jobs and 1.7 million customer queries and exports across the globe. As part of the Data Platform team, you’ll work on the core systems that make this scale possible. Three tightly aligned teams own the responsibilities of job scheduling, data retrieval, storage, transformation, and exposing data across the product.
   

  

 We’re evolving our platform and technology stack, and we’re looking for someone who can bring deep expertise in distributed systems, data infrastructure, and large-scale architecture. This is a high-impact role with meaningful influence on our technical direction—and plenty of opportunity to learn, innovate, and grow.
   

  

**About The Engineering Teams & The Role**
 Our teams own their product areas end-to-end, making daily decisions in close collaboration within and across teams, as well as with stakeholders. We work in small, iterative cycles- experimenting, learning, and deploying to production multiple times a day. We work closely with AI agents to accelerate everything from early prototyping and experimentation to building, shipping, and continuously learning in production.
   

  

 Our data platform is primarily built in Rust and runs in AWS. We use open-source technologies such as DataFusion, Arrow, Parquet, and Iceberg, and extend them with our own tooling to meet the unique needs of our product.
   

  

 At Funnel, engineers are responsible for the full lifecycle: from designing system architecture to implementation, deployment, and monitoring. With a customer-first mindset, we continually strive to build products that solve real problems and exceed expectations.
   

  

**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* Experience with systems programming languages such as Rust, C/C++, Java, or Scala
* Knowledge of cloud infrastructure and operations (AWS preferred)
* A default to AI mindset: leveraging AI agents to accelerate your work and impact
* Background in building distributed systems and addressing scalability, reliability, and fault-tolerance challenges
* Familiarity with large-scale batch processing systems
* Comfortable working in agile, collaborative teams
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Build meaningful tech that powers millions of daily jobs for customers around the world.
* Help shape our next-gen platform as we grow and move toward an AI-first future.
* Enjoy real ownership with the freedom to design, build, and ship every day.
* Work with friendly, collaborative teams who care about quality and each other.
* Grow with us in a company that invests in learning, innovation, and people.


**Location & Eligibility**
 At This Time, We Can Only Consider Applicants Who Are Already Based In Stockholm And Meet One Of The Following Criteria
   

  

* Hold Swedish citizenship
* Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently living in Stockholm
* Have a valid Swedish work permit


**Office-first**
 At Funnel, we have an office-first approach, and we work from the office a minimum of four days a week. We have lots of flexibility for when life happens, during the summer, through the holidays. We just like to avoid having standing remote days.
   

  

**About Funnel**
 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.
